title: Huawei Option 43
content:
Huawei Option 43 Online Calculator# In WLAN deployment, APs typically obtain the WAC’s IP address through the DHCP Option 43 field. This tool can be used to quickly calculate the Option 43 Hex configuration string.
WAC IP Address 1: WAC IP Address 2 (Optional, active/standby scenario): Calculate Option 43 Calculation Result: Calculation Instructions# The format of Huawei Option 43 field is usually: 03 (sub-option type) + Length (hexadecimal, 1 byte) + ASCII Hexadecimal of comma-separated IP string.
Single IP Example: Input 192.168.1.1 (length 11 bytes, hexadecimal is 0B) Output: 030B3139322E3136382E312E31
Dual IP Example: Input 192.168.1.1 and 192.168.1.2, concatenated as 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.2 (length 23 bytes, hexadecimal is 17) Output: 03173139322E3136382E312E312C3139322E3136382E312E32 (Note: According to the standard, when configuring two IP addresses, the calculation length should be the total length of the two IPs and the comma, which is 17.)

title: IP & Subnet Calculator
content:
IP & Subnet Calculator# This tool provides network address calculations, subnet mask conversions, and wildcard mask calculations.
1. Network Address Calculator IP Address & Prefix (e.g., 192.168.1.2/25): Calculate 2. Mask & Host Calculator Subnet Mask or Prefix Length (e.g., 25 or 255.255.255.128): Calculate 3. Wildcard Mask Calculator Subnet Mask (e.g., 255.255.255.0): Calculate 4. IP Range to Subnets (CIDR) IP Range (e.g., 192.168.1.0-192.168.1.65): Calculate

title: Batch Config Generator
content:
Batch Config Generator# This tool allows you to automatically generate repetitive configuration scripts or JSON based on a template. Define variables in your template using the {{{VariableName}}} syntax.
1. Template Use {{{VariableName}}} to define variables. Example provided below.
interface {{{var1}}} description {{{var2}}} port default vlan {{{var3}}} Extract Variables 2. Variable Values Enter one value per line for each variable. The number of lines must be at least equal to the loop count.
3. Loop Count (Max 300) Generate Config 4. Output Copy to Clipboard

title: Time & Timestamp Tools
content:
Time & Timestamp Tools# A comprehensive utility for real-time clock comparison, network time verification, timestamp conversion, and timezone calculations.
⏱️ Live Local & Network Standard Time LIVE 💻 Local Device Time GMT+02:00 0 0 : 0 0 : 0 0 2026-07-23 🌐 Network Standard Time GMT+02:00 0 0 : 0 0 : 0 0 2026-07-23 🌐 1. Clock Comparison & Sync (Local & Standard Time) Compare your device's local clock against UTC, Central European Time (CET/CEST), and major global timezones. 💻 Local Device Time GMT+02:00 00:00:00.000 2026-07-23 🌐 Standard UTC UTC+00:00 00:00:00.000 2026-07-23 🇪🇺 Central European Time (CET/CEST) UTC+02:00 00:00:00.000 2026-07-23 🇨🇳 Beijing Time (CST) UTC+08:00 00:00:00.000 2026-07-23 🇯🇵 Tokyo (JST) UTC+09:00 00:00:00.000 2026-07-23 ⏱️ Local Clock Offset: Checking... | RTT Latency: -- ms Click the button to measure offset between local system time and network standard time. 🔄 Verify Network Sync 🔄 2. Timestamp to Date/Time Enter Timestamp: Current Time Today 00:00 Yesterday 00:00 Detected Unit / Standard: Auto Detect (s / ms / μs / ns) Seconds (s) - 10 Digits Milliseconds (ms) - 13 Digits Microseconds (μs) - 16 Digits Nanoseconds (ns) - 19 Digits Target Timezone: Local Time UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) Central European Time (CET/CEST) Beijing Time (UTC+8 / CST) Tokyo Time (UTC+9 / JST) London (UTC+0 / GMT/BST) New York (UTC-5 / EST/EDT) Converted Results: Standard Format -- Copy With Milliseconds -- Copy ISO 8601 -- Copy RFC 2822 -- Copy Relative Time -- 📅 3. Date/Time to Timestamp Pick Date & Time: Or Enter Custom Date/Time String: Now Today 00:00 Today 23:59:59 Yesterday 00:00 Tomorrow 00:00 Input Timezone Context: Local Timezone UTC (Universal Time) UTC+02:00 (Central European Summer Time / CEST) UTC+08:00 (Beijing / CST) Generated Timestamps: Seconds (10-digit) s -- Copy Milliseconds (13-digit) ms -- Copy Microseconds (16-digit) μs -- Copy Nanoseconds (19-digit) ns -- Copy

title: Network Tools
content:
Networking Toolkit Essential utilities for network engineering, configuration, and diagnostics.
🧮 Huawei Option 43 Quickly calculate DHCP Option 43 hexadecimal strings for Huawei WLAN AP deployments.
🌐 IP & Subnet Calculate network addresses, subnets, usable hosts, and convert wildcard masks easily.
🔍 Public IP Lookup Automatically detect your public IP and look up detailed location, ASN, and ISP info for any IP.
🛠️ Batch Config Generator Automatically generate repetitive configuration scripts or JSON based on templates with dynamic variables.
⏱️ Time & Timestamp Real-time clock comparison (兑时), network time sync, timestamp conversion, and timezone calculations.
